_comment: MCP servers are TOKEN-INTENSIVE. Use for external/shared AI assistants only. For personal use, prefer Python scripts in execution/

_usage_guide.external_assistants: USE MCP - standardization benefits outweigh token costs
_usage_guide.rate_limited_apis: USE MCP - automatic rate limiting is valuable (e.g., amazon-sp-api)

google-sheets.description: Google Sheets integration - USE FOR DEPLOYED ASSISTANTS ONLY

google-drive.description: Google Drive - USE FOR DEPLOYED ASSISTANTS ONLY

amazon-sp-api.description: Amazon SP-API - RECOMMENDED due to automatic rate limiting

filesystem.description: File system - NOT RECOMMENDED, use native Claude tools instead

brave-search.description: Web search - NOT RECOMMENDED, Claude has built-in search
